_meta.description: Region-wide vegetation greenness change (NDVI) for the Cape & Islands, computed in Google Earth Engine from Sentinel-2 imagery.
_meta.units: change in mean NDVI over the trailing window (dimensionless)
_meta.note: Negative values indicate declining vegetation greenness. Windows are relative (trailing N-year change), not fixed calendar years.
_meta.displayed_in: Ecosystem Health overlay, per-region 'Satellite NDVI' cards
